goal: Write initial Supabase schema migrations under supabase/migrations/. Target project: dqsdfwcuhiiiztryrkwc (GAD). Tables: (1) users — Clerk-mirrored { clerk_user_id PK, email, display_name, created_at }. (2) projects — { id PK, owner_user_id FK, name, slug unique-per-owner, description, visibility enum(private/public/unlisted), created_at, updated_at }. (3) species — { id PK, project_id FK, name, slug, kind, dna_summary jsonb, created_at, updated_at }. (4) generations — { id PK, species_id FK, version_number, manifest jsonb, build_artifact_url, trace_url, review_score numeric(3,1), created_at }. (5) publishes — { id PK, generation_id FK, published_by_user_id FK, published_at, marketplace_status enum, scraped_metadata jsonb }. (6) assets — { id PK, project_id FK, species_id nullable FK, generation_id nullable FK, storage_path, bucket_name, mime_type, size_bytes, labels text[], created_at } — storage refs filled in phase 71. RLS: owner_user_id reads/writes own rows; public projects readable by anyone. Apply locally via 'pnpm supabase db push' — operator confirms remote apply. Include seed data for a test project row so platform can render against real DB.
